---
title: "utility_belt.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\utility_belt.py"
loc: 167
complexity: 21
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.59
intel_score: 5.71
overall_score: 2.68
---

## Intent
The `utility_belt.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on UtilityBelt, __init__, _refactor_code, _clean_markdown, _verify_crucible, _human_review, _commit_refactor, execute, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via UtilityBelt, __init__, _refactor_code, _clean_markdown, _verify_crucible, _human_review, _commit_refactor, execute, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)

### Exports
- `UtilityBelt`
- `__init__`
- `_refactor_code`
- `_clean_markdown`
- `_verify_crucible`
- `_human_review`
- `_commit_refactor`
- `execute`
- `main`
